name: stage-hero
description: Modernes, frisches Hero-Bild für Opener/Chapter-Opener auf der Bühne
style_instructions: Style: modern, fresh, contemporary editorial illustration. Clean abstract geometric composition with smooth gradients, crisp vector forms and a light premium-tech feel. Vibrant fresh accent palette (teal, lime green, electric blue, warm coral) over a rich deep base. Bright, optimistic and energetic with a soft luminous glow and high clarity.
composition: Strong negative space in the upper-left/top 40% for a title overlay. Subject anchored lower-right or centered-low. Balanced, uncluttered, generous breathing room.
negative: no text, no logos, no people's faces, no cartoon style, no 3D render, no stock-photo look, no muted or dull or desaturated colors, no somber or gloomy mood, no grunge, no AI-glow artifacts, no children's book illustration
